name: Hank's Cafe
description:
drink gotten: hot lavender latte
singlehandedly the best cafe i have been to (although sujus will always hold a special place in my heart god bless fremont) the drink is stellar, so much space to sit, perfect vibe, not too far from ucla, comfy couches, and its not even that expensive??? GOATED!!!

name: Avva Coffee Beverly Hills
description:
drink gotten: hot lavender latte
very nice and cute but there's like no seating which is so sad. drink was good though and i had a fun time getting there and walking past the rich people buildings so worth it overall

name: 10 Speed Coffee Sawtelle
description:
drink gotten: matcha latte w/ agave
vibes are perfect and it's really clean but the matcha was BITTER which i didnt love. its a really good place to work though so i freak w this place. (former drink rating: 5/10)
edit: latte was good a bit too sweet but i fucked with it also lucy says to try the honey matcha iced so jay sri

name: DAMO
description:
drink gotten: iced hojicha latte
goated teahouse first ktown W so far. place was clean, there was a surprisingly good amount of seating and outlets and working wifi?? drink was really good but it was like 60% ice i totally got scammed. for $7 it was not enough drink but the menu looked really good def worth another visit.

name: About Time
description:
drink gotten: spanish latte
really like this one! only gripe was cost but it's ktown so it's not that surprising. LOTS OF SEATING (W), good drink (maybe a little heavy on the milk but still enjoyed) which was not too heavy on cinnamon but still really enjoyable, outlets, very pretty and spacious, open late. i liked the addition of the upstairs too. wifi kinda ass too but oh well

name: Espressoteric Coffee Co.
description:
drink gotten: iced ube latte
great place for working, theres wifi and outlets and tons of seating which is super nice and i was able to get work done which was a massive W. drink was hm...i won't knock too hard because ube is a hard flavor but it wasn't bad, just eh. would go again bc can walk there and 10% student discount!

name: SERIES A COFFEE
description:
drink gotten: black sesame latte
vibes --> peak. their menu is super interesting and this cafe is maybe a yellow but because i liked the menu so much i'm bumping it up because i'd go again. wifi is fast, outlets are plentiful (even have usb-c which is goated), theres decent seating and a tv for switch games in case you want a break. drink was...hm! very heavy on the black sesame and not enough sweetness for me but presentation-wise it was really pretty.

name: Alchemist Coffee Project (culver city)
description:
drink gotten: spanish latte (iced)
i fucking love this place because they played fainted love 😮‍💨. very clean very relaxing atmosphere. seating is ehh? you kinda gotta get lucky. menu is pretty standard but they have some interesting drinks. ive never really had strong opinions about spanish lattes but this was def my favorite ive had so far. marked off a point bc they put so much ice that i finished in 5 minutes but it wasnt too cinnamony or too sweet which i liked. they have really nice beans too! and good wifi and ports! and the area is p nice. would go again as fuck

name: Neighborhood
description:
drink gotten: la brea latte (molasses and ginger latte)
drink was super interesting. ginger latte i think could be done really well, i think its only fault was having too dark a roast and a more acidic and lighter roast would've helped a lot. the outside area was super nice but the seating in the back is kinda out of the way. the tables inside were nice but so many people too loud ahh. wifi and plugs were there but plugs only inside rip. had a good time!

name: COIN DE RUE dessert cafe
description:
drink gotten: earl gray dalgona latte
almost a yellow bc of my drink but lowkey i'd go again. drink was so milky. its so pretty fr but there was no taste of earl gray?? which like bro it's in the drink name. but have heard that this drink is normally good so i have my doubts. ti got a "peach espresso" (like a sweetened iced peach americano?) which was pretty decent and not astringent at all so i give points for that. soo much seating and good wifi, outlets are there (would like some more but still good). honestly i would go again but for the space and not the drinks.

name: Alchemist Coffee Project (ktown)
description:
drink gotten: iced spanish latte
big alchemist fan no complaints here. actually i have one which is that they ran out of beans for sale which is so sad because their beans are my favorite that i've bought so far but oh well. decent amount of seating outlets, wifi is good, drink is really good, i deadass have not one complaint about this place. kinda expensive i guess but worth.

name: STAGGER COFFEE
description:
drink gotten: hojicha cream top
SURPRISINGLY GOOD!! was expecting it to be a really overrated place but i really like the menu and they have a nice mix of coffee and matcha drinks. their coffee is really fresh too, the bag on sale was only 2 days old which is nice. interior is nice, wifi is good and theres ok seating (not many outlets tho). drink was decent wish is was more hojicha heavy but still good. will def go again :3

name: SIPP COFFEE HOUSE
description:
drink gotten: hot lavender latte
really liked this place! super clean inside, and i really like the secluded outside seating. i also like the mugs and service (barista was very friendly). the coffee was good not amazing, but i liked the vibe a lot, and it wasn't too crowded.

name: 3THYME COFFEE
description:
drink gotten: iced rose latte/some korean rice latte
this place is def carried by the drinks, and they definitely know the coffee. seating is LIMITED! but the menu is good, the drinks were GOOD (really floral rose which is chefs kiss).

name: Cafe Loft
description:
drink gotten: hot rose latte
so cute place fire sauce. they have a loft for seating as well as the bottom floor, so there's a lot. staff were really friendly, outlet situation is ehhhh but theyre in the corner if you don't need direct access. drink was REALLY good, points knocked cuz their matcha not amazing but the coffee + vibez was def the star.

name: Spot Coffee & More
description:
drink gotten: black sesame cream top latte
good things first: interesting menu, open late, wifi works, the seating is nice and it's very pretty. other than that is is very classic ktown. expensive, the drink was fine (the injeolmi was p good but i only had sips of it) but definitely unique although thats more due to me not really getting black sesame lattes. the drinks were very pretty but the parking is bad and the seating is SUPER tight so there are def other late night options.

name: Board House Coffee
description:
drink gotten: hot lavender latte
really fucking cheap how did i spend 4.50 on a good latte? it was kinda small and messy which i wasn't a fan of but i fuck with the pricing i could go again

name: Coffee Tomo
description:
drink gotten: tomo latte 
more expensive side which imo wasnt worth but it was fine ($7 for an unsweetened latte is nuts). it felt a lil musty which isn't the worst thing ever but it works as a cafe

name: RNY Coffee Studio
description:
drink gotten: hot lavender latte 
kinda didn't get to properly judge this cafe but it was fs nice and aesthetic and the drink was pretty solid it just didn't stand out to me
edit on visit 2: still a yellow i think, the hojicha i got was good but tiny and everything else holds. lots of seating just a lil forgettable though

name: Black Canvas Coffee
description:
drink gotten: hot honey latte
super clean cute everything but it was expensive (MID!!) and the drink was nothing special. but there's a lot of seating so i liked it overall

name: Document Coffee Bar
description:
drink gotten: document latte (latte w maple syrup)
just fine? nothing special i think. i liked the theming but the entrance was literally a hole in the wall and there's really sparse seating. the corner we sat in was kinda icky and there was a huge fly that pissed me tf off. wifi = none, and the drink was fine. ti's drink was good though, and the menu looked interesting. borderline red, but i didn't hate this place so it's a yellow

name: Coffee Connection
description:
drink gotten: cinnamon sugar iced latte (imagine a more mid spanish latte)
peak mid imo. good to work because there was a lot of seating and functional wifi but other than that it was fine. kinda run down and the drink was MID!!! i think they put a single shot of espresso or something bc it was pretty weak and milky. but students dicsount so i got it for less than $5 which i liked

name: Established Today
description:
drink(s) gotten: hot honey latte (8/10), london fog (7/10)
i really really really wish i could've rated this place higher but i was sadly a little disappointed. i think this cafe is everything it says it is, which is trendy, vibey, and modern, but it's a little too strong? obv there are records everywhere so music was booming but it was so loud and there's no real quiet area inside if you want your own music. drinks were decent, nothing special and i wish they had more options in syrups but it's ok. seating is plenty, wifi is good, lots of space, and it is VERY aesthetic!! good commitment to the vibe but a little lacking otherwise.

name: Primo Passo Coffee Co
description:
drink gotten: hot hazelnut latte
such a boy cafe is how i'd put it. no they them baristas!! grr!!! very coffee centric cafe, not that it's a bad thing. would have liked to see less dark coffees on their menu, its definitely a very dark coffee kinda place. drink was decent, maybe would've enjoyed more if i wasn't already tweaking from a latte but definitely exactly what it advertised, you can actually taste the hazelnut which is nice. outlets exist but no wifi, but there's a decent amount of seating. definitely can't complain but there's better out there.

name: Coffee MCO
description:
drink gotten: black sesame hojicha latte
so disappointing! ok good things first: very interesting menu (many things i wanted to try), lot of seating (although most of it is outdoors and it is la so it gets hot, and the day we went it was very hot and the sun was angled in a way that their umbrellas did not help), drink was p good (wish it was a little less cream and more hojicha though because black sesame is an overpowering flavor) and it is super clean. bad things: expensive (even for ktown, $8+ for an ICED 12 oz drink is insane), wifi just did not work, not enough shade on outside seating. would maybee come back on a less crowded day where we could get seating inside and its not 80 degrees in winter quarter but oh well!

name: M3 COFFEE
description:
drink gotten: m3 einspanner
fine? expensive and tight seating, nothing unusual for ktown. drink was p good, but it was just an iced latte but thicker, not really sure if it was worth like $9 bruh. tables are kinda small but there are outlets. service is p good too. it's just there imo but not horrible!

name: Stereoscope Coffee
description:
drink gotten: madagascar vanilla latte
DISAPPOINTING AS FUCK. i really had high hopes, this place has a really detailed coffee menu, beans for sale with really interesting roast profiles (chamoy and blue raspberry candy??). wifi was there (not sure about outlets), seating is plentiful although not many actual high tables. fairly typical la pricing which i wouldn't mind if the drink was really good, but both drinks i tried were too sweet in that way that makes you nauseous internally. the vanilla latte was almost floral which i wouldn't be against if it wasn't so fucking sweet. beans were really expensive too (who is buying $35 beans bffr). sad! could've been good.

name: goodboybob coffee roasters
description:
drink quality: 9.5/10
drink gotten: iced black sesame latte
drink was almost perfect, only knocked down a bit because it was a touch too sweet, but that's fine. vibe is chill, it's just very crowded and you're kinda forced to sit outside (where there are tables) but still a consideration. also really crowded which was unfortunate. i liked their menu though, and i've never had a black sesame latte which was good and yet didn't threaten to choke me with how thick it was, so overall worth for the coffee.

name: Alana's Coffee Roasters
description:
drink gotten: iced spanish latte
potential....the drinks are super milky, which is sad because this is a coffee roaster? i really wish it was stronger. they have a seasonal menu which is kinda not really seasonal (a maple syrup latte is not seasonal that's a normal menu item it is deadass almost summer) wifi is good, there are tables inside and out and they were open, which are all good things. the seats are also super comfy benches, so you could work here for a while.

name: Tom n Toms Black
description:
drink gotten: einspanner black
wouldn't really say this place is anything special, kinda reminded me of a starbucks with more interesting options. drink was def decent, not amazing and not horrible, there's a lot of seating (not really the cleanest) and i can't imagine had it not been finals week that i would've gotten a whole lot of work done here. idk...

name: Malou Coffee
description:
drinks gotten: iced latte, okinawa matcha
good things: the matcha was pretty good (and i don't usually like matcha), and so was the coffee. food was also decent. the wifi is not super good, and the outside seating (there is none inside) smells like human excrement in some places. it's also pretty sunny and there aren't many tables. the place is pretty expensive too, which is unfortunate. it is close to school, and if there was more seating and better wifi, i would've liked it more

name: Boondocks Coffee Roasters
description:
drink gotten: ube latte/westwood fog
review for both times no pictures lol but i think i have been quite disappointed by the drinks here? the coffee is oft watered down heavily by ice (which i see as a fault of the cafe) and the westwood fog, which is supposed to be a cold brew coffee drink tasted like nothing lowkey. seating is usually taken.

name: MEMORYLOOK COFFEE & FLAGSHIP STORE
description:
drink gotten: iced caramel latte
definition of overhyped aesthetic la cafe!!!! drink was fine but this place was expensive and the seating was all taken which is so sad. would not go again ngl

name: Espresso Profeta
description:
drink gotten: spanish latte 
knocking points for the insane lack of seating and the drink was pretty mid for how expensive this place is. it's close which is nice i guess but wouldn't recommend

name: SACHI.LA
description:
drink gotten: sachi special (cold brew, vanilla, oat milk)
im so disappointed i had such high hopes. good things first: very cute, not the most expensive, wifi works. bad: very very limited seating, drinks were ASS. maybe cold brew isnt for me but of the 3 drinks they were all mid to bad?? they did not balance the acidity of the cold brew at all.

name: Bonsai Coffee Bar
description:
drink gotten: bonsai latte (basically a dirty matcha latte)
BOOOOO so disappointed. closes at 4 which is sad, wifi is limited to 2 hours per drink (yes they enforce it) and their matcha was not good?? normally i'm not a matcha person but i decided to be bold and try their seemingly signature drink because it's supposed to be good. right???? no. their matcha isn't ceremonial grade so its just grassy, they paired it with a very dark roast so there was no acidity to play with the matcha, and there was so much dissonance in that drink. in fact all 3 matcha drinks were bad. only pros were that it is very pretty and theres a good deal of seating + outlets.

name: La La Land Kind Cafe
description:
drink gotten: lavender bloom w/ espresso (like a fancier lavender latte)
so fucking disappointed. there's like 3 outlets total, none of which are next to tables. the inside was almost dirty? theres crumbs and unpicked up trash everywhere. the drinks are especially expensive, never seen $7 base price for almost every drink in a normal cafe. it was def very aesthetic but the drink is super milky and i struggled to taste the espresso, and it was so small. outdoor seating was nice because weather was chill but...disappointing
